title: Arenaria × piifontii
taxonomy: Arenaria × piifontii is classified as a hybrid plant, resulting from the cross-breeding of Arenaria balearica and Arenaria grandiflora. This hybrid plant is often used as an ornamental in gardens due to its attractive foliage and vibrant flowers. Arenaria × piifontii belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the pink or carnation family. Within the Caryophyllaceae family, Arenaria × piifontii is classified as a member of the genus Arenaria. The exact classification may vary depending on the source, but it is generally recognized as a hybrid of the two mentioned Arenaria species.
